## 🔬 Deep Research
**⚡ Quick Summary**  
Young & Co.’s Brewery, P.L.C. is a brewery and hospitality group that operates pubs, bars, and event venues (such as Enderby House in Greenwich) and offers a mobile app called *On Tap* for its customers.
